description: Query a consult agent for the ordered list of naming roots to search when resolving a human-readable campfire name. Sent as a future by the resolver; the consult agent fulfills it with join-root-result. The join_root field seeds the consult with the operator's configured default root — implementations MAY use it as a fallback, prepend it, or ignore it.

args.name: name
args.description: The human-readable name being resolved (e.g. "galtrader" or "aietf.social.lobby")

args.name: join_root
args.description: The operator's configured default join root. The consult agent may use this as a seed or fallback when building the root list.
